title: PolyIE Polymer Information Extraction
description: Schema for polymer property extraction from scientific literature, based on the PolyIE dataset. Relations link chemical names to their measured properties and values, optionally with experimental conditions.

entities.description: Named entities extracted from the text.

chemicalNames.description: Chemical/polymer names or abbreviations (e.g., P3HT, PEDOT:PSS, poly(3-hexylthiophene)).

propertyNames.description: Names of measured properties (e.g., PCE, Voc, Jsc, decomposition temperature, band gap).

conditions.description: Experimental conditions under which measurements were taken (e.g., 5% weight loss, room temperature).

relations.description: Relations linking a chemical name to a property name and its value, optionally with a condition.

chemicalName.description: The chemical/polymer name this property belongs to.

propertyName.description: The name of the measured property.
